get.description: Return basic API status for uptime checks.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api V1 Health Get

post.description: Create a host account and return a bearer access token.

403.description: Account is disabled or blocked

post.description: Authenticate with email/password and return a bearer access token.

403.description: Account is disabled or blocked

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile without password hash data.

403.description: Account is disabled or blocked

get.description: Return approved, active, guest-facing event information. This never includes host identifiers, internal event identifiers, or a guest list.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

get.description: Look up one guest by name inside a single public event lookup token. The response is limited to that guest's own event/table/seat details.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

post.description: Look up one guest seat assignment for a public event. The required fields depend on the event's guest_lookup_mode: name_only, invite_code, or personal_token. The response never includes event IDs, guest tokens, invite codes, or a guest list.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

get.description: Return a small, prefix-matched list of guest display names for the guest-facing autocomplete. This never includes assignments, contact fields, tokens, internal IDs, or private guest metadata.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

patch.description: Let one guest self-confirm that they found their table or seat. This public route is scoped by the shared event lookup token and guest id, is idempotent, and never returns an event id, guest tokens, invite codes, or a guest list.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

get.description: Return approved, active event information for one guest invite token. This does not reveal the guest assignment until the guest confirms their name.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

get.description: Look up one guest assignment through a guest-specific invite token and typed name confirmation. The response is limited to that guest's own event/table/seat.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

post.description: Let an anonymous guest upload one event-level photo through the public event lookup token. The event must be approved, active, Premium tier, and have Photo Share enabled. Accepted file types are PNG, JPEG, and WebP. Raw files are stored outside PostgreSQL.

404.description: Public event or guest was not found

403.description: Photo sharing is unavailable

post.description: Create an event for the authenticated host with core event fields first. Menu, floor-plan, Spotify playlist, and QR setup can be configured later through dedicated asset endpoints. Admins may create for a host by supplying host_id. Tier-gated fields are enforced by the backend.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: List non-deleted events visible to the authenticated host. Admin callers can use this admin-aware host route, but cross-host admin browsing should prefer the /admin/events endpoint.

schema.title: Response List Host Events Api V1 Host Events Get

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return one event only when it belongs to the host or the caller is admin.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

patch.description: Update one host-owned event. Tier-gated fields are rejected unless the target event tier allows them.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

delete.description: Soft-delete an event so it disappears from host lists and all public lookup.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

post.description: Upload or replace a host-owned event menu image. Accepted file types are PNG, JPEG, and WebP. Raw files are stored outside PostgreSQL under generated object keys.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return the configured menu metadata for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

patch.description: Replace the configured menu image for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

delete.description: Remove the configured menu from one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

post.description: Upload or replace a host-owned event floor plan. Accepted file types are PNG, JPEG, WebP, and PDF. Raw files are stored outside PostgreSQL under generated object keys.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return the configured floor-plan URL for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

patch.description: Replace the configured floor plan for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

delete.description: Remove the configured floor plan from one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

post.description: Attach or replace a Spotify playlist URL for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return the configured Spotify playlist URL for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

patch.description: Replace the configured Spotify playlist URL for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

delete.description: Remove the configured Spotify playlist URL from one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

post.description: Create a random, non-PII QR lookup token for one host-owned event. The token points guests to the narrow public event lookup flow and does not contain internal IDs, guest names, or host identifiers.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return the existing QR lookup token and public lookup paths for one host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return guest-uploaded photos for one host-owned event.

schema.title: Response List Event Photos Api V1 Host Events  Event Id  Photos Get

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

patch.description: Approve, reject, or return one guest-uploaded event photo to pending status.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

delete.description: Delete one guest-uploaded event photo row and its stored asset.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

post.description: Create one guest under an event owned by the authenticated host.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: List guests only for an event owned by the authenticated host.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Return one guest only when it belongs to the requested host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

patch.description: Update one guest only when it belongs to the requested host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

delete.description: Delete one guest only when it belongs to the requested host-owned event.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

post.description: Parse a UTF-8 CSV and create normalized guest rows for one host-owned event. The raw uploaded file is not stored.

403.description: Role or tier is not allowed

get.description: Admin-only list of platform users. Password hashes are never returned.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Admin Users Get

403.description: Admin access is required

get.description: Admin-only user detail without password hash data.

403.description: Admin access is required

patch.description: Admin-only host approval lifecycle endpoint. Only role=host users can be updated, and password hashes are never returned.

403.description: Admin access is required

get.description: Admin-only event list across hosts. Guest lists are not embedded.

schema.title: Response List Events Api V1 Admin Events Get

403.description: Admin access is required

get.description: Admin-only activity log feed. Use start_date and end_date as inclusive UTC calendar-day filters.

schema.title: Response List Activity Logs Api V1 Admin Activity Logs Get

403.description: Admin access is required

get.description: Admin-only event detail without embedded guests.

403.description: Admin access is required

get.description: Admin-only list of submitted payment records. Proof files are URL references only.

schema.title: Response List Payment Submissions Api V1 Admin Payment Submissions Get

403.description: Admin access is required

get.description: Admin-only detail for one payment submission record.

403.description: Admin access is required

patch.description: Approve or reject an existing payment submission. Approval updates the linked event approval state; rejection stores only admin notes, not extra PII.

403.description: Admin access is required

BearerAuth.description: Paste the access_token returned by POST /api/v1/auth/login.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Operational readiness checks for deployments and monitoring.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Host registration, login, and current-user endpoints.

tags.name: Host Events
tags.description: Authenticated host event management scoped to owned events.

tags.name: Host Guests
tags.description: Authenticated guest-list management scoped to one owned event.

tags.name: Host Event Assets
tags.description: Authenticated event asset setup for menus, floor plans, playlists, and QR codes.

tags.name: Public Guest Lookup
tags.description: Anonymous guest-facing lookup with narrow, event-scoped responses.

tags.name: Public Photos
tags.description: Anonymous guest photo uploads for approved active Premium events.

tags.name: Host Photos
tags.description: Authenticated host moderation of guest-uploaded event photos.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment submission review APIs. Upload flows are intentionally later.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Reserved for future object-storage-backed media APIs.
